log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a 64-bit PE executable, packed with UPX, and has a corrupt tag. Get an overview of the available IOCs to see what types of data are available.

There is a unique IP address involved, but no domains or HTTP conversations. The sample dropped 7 files, but no registry persistence keys or mutexes were created. Investigate the network activity to s

The IP address 3.120.98.217 is making TCP connections to port 8080, but there are no DNS lookups or HTTP conversations. Investigate the files dropped by the sample to see if any of them are suspicious
The sample dropped 7 files in the C:\Windows\System directory, but their types are unknown. Investigate the process activity to see what the sample was doing before dropping these files.

The sample loaded several system DLLs, including kernel32 and ws2_32, but there are no notable processes created or mutexes created. Investigate the registry changes to see if the sample made any pers
The sample did not make any registry persistence changes. Investigate the CAPA behaviors to see if they provide any insights into the sample's behavior.

The sample exhibits behaviors such as changing memory protection, allocating or changing RW memory, terminating processes, and being packed with UPX. It also references anti-VM strings targeting VMWar
